articles.title: Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ storms the box office with a $264.1 million global debut
articles.description:
Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey” launched with an estimated $124.5 million in domestic ticket sales and another $139.6 million from overseas, even better than the filmmaker's “Oppenheimer” debut.

The post Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ storms the box office with a $264.1 million global debut appeared first on Boston.com.
